prompt:
Scene:
Same synthetic model identity as the reference image, now in a clean editorial office lobby with soft daylight, pale stone floor, and restrained fashion-catalog composition. Full-body square crop, camera at chest height, natural standing pose.

Subject:
Preserve the reference model exactly: same oval face, warm medium-brown skin tone, short natural black curls, straight eyebrows, almond-shaped dark eyes, beauty mark under the left eye, lean athletic build, and body proportions. Change only the outfit to a tailored office look: ivory double-breasted blazer, slate tapered trousers, black loafers, narrow silver belt, and a structured charcoal tote.

Important details:
Identity lock is the main test. Do not alter face, age, skin tone, hair, body, height, or facial proportions. Keep realistic fabric fit and garment drape, polished editorial lighting, crisp tailoring, and natural pose. The outfit should look convincingly worn by the same person from the reference.

Use case:
Second image in a reference-dependent virtual try-on series, testing wardrobe change while preserving synthetic model identity.

Constraints:
PRESERVE the reference model identity exactly. Change only clothing, shoes, bag, and setting. No readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no face retouching, no body shape changes, no distorted hands or feet, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Tailored Office Look
description: The same synthetic model wears an ivory blazer office look.

generation.runner_notes: Fanout variation; queue injects the 01 runtime URL as --ref.
